sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id Int32, geom String, area Float64, calculated_area Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geo_test (id, geom, area) VALUES (1, 'POLYGON((0 0,5 0,5 5,0 5,0 0))', 25.0, 24.9);
INSERT INTO geo_test (id, geom, area) VALUES (2, 'POLYGON((1 1,10 1,10 10,1 10,1 1))', 81.0, 80.0);
SELECT id, readWKTPolygon(geom) AS polygon_geom, area - calculated_area AS area_difference FROM geo_test WHERE area IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, readWKTPolygon(geom) AS polygon_geom, (area - calculated_area) * 2 AS scaled_difference FROM geo_test HAVING scaled_difference > 0;
SELECT id, (SELECT SUM(area) FROM geo_test WHERE area IS NOT NULL) AS total_area, readWKTPolygon(geom) AS polygon_geom FROM geo_test WHERE area <= total_area;
SELECT id, readWKTPolygon('POLYGON((2 0,3 1,3 2,2 3,2 0))') AS polygon, (area - 5.0) AS area_adjusted FROM geo_test WHERE area_adjusted < 0;
SELECT id, readWKTPolygon(geom) AS polygon_geom, IFNULL((area - calculated_area), 0) AS adjusted_difference FROM geo_test WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, area - (SELECT MAX(calculated_area) FROM geo_test) AS area_compared FROM geo_test WHERE geom = 'POLYGON((0 0,10 0,10 10,0 10,0 0))';
SELECT id, readWKTPolygon(geom) AS polygon_geom, area / (CASE WHEN area > 0 THEN area ELSE 1 END) AS normalized_area FROM geo_test;
